name: Siddhesh' Savepoint
tagline: Welcome to my humble digital abode!
bio: I'm Siddhesh but have profiles under the name SiddEz, IdkRandomTry or something similar. This is my personal website, which I intend to use just like savepoint in video games - to save my progress and completed quests :D. I prefer thinking of my website in this way rather than a traditional "portfolio." It urges me to fill it with content I am proud of!
